final:
// // When sel is 0, concatenate b and a; when sel is 1, concatenate a and b
module top_module (
	input [3:0] a, 
	input [3:0] b, 
	input sel, 
	output reg [7:0] y);always @(*) 
		case (sel)
			0: y = {a, b};
			1: y = {b, a};
		endcase
	
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // When sel is 0, concatenate b and a; when sel is 1, concatenate a and b
